article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.5. Prop. Bylaw Amendments for E-Bike Share and Prov. Electric Kick Scooter Pilot Programs - 2026-04-14 .pdf

briefs.title: Council to Vote on Bylaw Changes for E-Bike Share and E-Scooter Programs in Burnaby
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council is set to vote on amendments to three city bylaws that would set rules for a new shared e-bike rental program and for privately owned electric kick scooters — covering where they can ride, where they can park, and how violations are enforced.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision — new riding and parking rules could affect how you or your customers travel nearby.

key_dates.label: Burnaby E-Bike Share and E-Scooter bylaw amendments — council vote
